title: calophyllum persimile
intro: Calophyllum persimile is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the green heart tree or dragon's blood tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The extracts of Calophyllum persimile have been found to have various health benefits, including anti-cancer, anti-diabetic, and cardiovascular protective effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, oil, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
